title: RDF Dataset
description: Schema describing an RDF dataset, which consists of a default graph and zero or more named graphs. Datasets are used to organize and partition RDF data into distinct graph contexts, as defined in the RDF 1.1 specification.

defaultGraph.description: The default (unnamed) graph of the dataset containing a collection of RDF quads without an explicit graph name.

namedGraphs.description: A map of graph names (IRIs) to arrays of quads, representing the named graphs in the dataset.

quad.description: An RDF quad representing a triple within a specific graph context.

subject.description: The subject of the statement, an IRI or blank node.

predicate.description: The predicate of the statement, always an IRI.

object.description: The object of the statement, an IRI, blank node, or literal.

graph.description: The graph name for this quad, an IRI identifying the named graph.

term.description: An RDF term representing a node or value in the graph.

termType.description: The type of this RDF term.

value.description: The value of the term: an IRI for NamedNode, identifier for BlankNode, or lexical form for Literal.

language.description: The language tag for language-tagged literal values.

datatype.description: The datatype of a literal term.
